meaning: n.火柴杆,火柴杆似的东西
examples: Use their brains to mobile matchstick achieve!
Take a wooden matchstick and slice a thin sliver from one side.
Aspen isn't very flammable, making for a slow-burning, non-fingertip-singeing matchstick.
Several stages of cooling are needed to slow them down before they can be trapped, forming a matchstick-sized cloud of around 30, 000 particles.
In the firmament of Welsh boxing legends, no star has burned so brightly, or for such a tragically short time, as the "Merthyr Matchstick", Johnny Owen.
